item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.0
Shruti 1.1 makes the per-app mixer dependable as a product, not just a local build.
- Adds secure Sparkle updates with a signed feed and signed archives. - Ships universal Apple Silicon and Intel binaries with a macOS 14.2 minimum. - Adds an account-free licensing client, 14-day trial enforcement, three-Mac activation, offline grace, and safe direct-path behavior when entitlement ends. The merchant endpoint remains disabled until Nathaniel's production checkout and signing key are provisioned. - Adds first-run permission and service setup, local-only crash markers, redacted support bundles, searchable help, an in-app uninstaller, VoiceOver improvements, and Hindi setup, support, update, and licensing strings. - Persists MIDI mappings, fixes multi-app duck timing, reports real output-leg latency, enforces Auto Direct, and reverts failed optimistic UI changes with a visible error. - Hardens output groups, app attribution, device changes, service bootstrapping, and the bit-transparent direct path while keeping Stage Mode available within one buffer.
